findings.title: Policy is not default-deny
findings.detail: defaultDeny should be true so ungranted capabilities are refused, not silently allowed.

findings.title: Shell access granted
findings.detail: allowShell=true lets tools run arbitrary commands. Gate behind approval or disable.

findings.title: Network access granted
findings.detail: allowNetwork=true widens the exfiltration surface. Scope to specific hosts if possible.

findings.title: File-write access granted
findings.detail: allowFileWrite=true lets tools modify the filesystem. Confirm this is intended.

findings.title: No approval gate for dangerous tools
findings.detail: requireApprovalForDangerous should be true so dangerous tools need explicit consent.

findings.title: Audit log disabled
findings.detail: auditLog=false means tool calls are not recorded — required for enterprise trust.

findings.title: No tool timeout
findings.detail: toolTimeoutMs must be a positive number so a hung tool cannot stall the agent.

findings.title: No per-turn tool-call budget
findings.detail: maxToolCallsPerTurn bounds runaway loops; set a positive limit.

findings.title: Secrets not denied
findings.detail: permissions.deny should block Read(./.env*) so tools cannot read credentials.

findings.title: 21 unpinned dependency range(s)
findings.detail: Floating ranges weaken supply-chain reproducibility: @huggingface/transformers, @ruvector/learning-wasm, @ruvector/router, @ruvector/rvf-node, @ruvector/sona, axe-core, better-sqlite3, chalk, cli-progress, commander, fast-glob, fast-json-patch, jose, ora, pg, prime-radiant-advanced-wasm, secure-json-parse, uuid, vibium, web-tree-sitter, yaml.
